creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Girgen actually fixed this 
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/databases/postgresql91-server/Makefile.diff?r1=1.233;r2=1.234;f=h) 
a while ago, but apparently didn't notice your PR.  I'm sorry it went 
ignored for so long, hopefully your other experiences are better. 
Thanks for the report.
